title: Escola Base - Um Repórter Enfrenta o Passado
original_title: Escola Base: Um Repórter Enfrenta o Passado
overview: Valmir Salaro was the first reporter to report an allegation of abuse of 4-year-olds. The accused were innocent and the case became a national scandal. 28 years later, he is reunited with the accused.
